headline: One of the Stock Market’s Biggest Bulls Sees a Historic Rally Coming
summary: U.S. stocks are likely set for a historic run over the next two years, with gains not seen on Wall Street since the dot-com era of the late 1990s.  The compelling push to mark stocks higher has prompted a response from one of Wall Street’s longstanding bears, who now sees U.S. stocks rising to as high as 8000 points by the end of this year, and to 8300 points over the next 12 months, amid a hot domestic economy, public to private rebalancing, and broadening earnings performance beyond the megacap tech space.  Morgan Stanley’s  Mike Wilson, famously one of Wall Street’s most skeptical analysts during the bull market that developed after the launch of OpenAI’s ChatGPT in November 2022, sees stocks powering to record highs this year and next, with a 12-month price target for the  that would suggest gains of around 130% on a five-year basis.

headline: Morgan Stanley Deepens Digital Bond Push With LTX AI Partnership
summary: Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) has joined AI-driven bond trading platform LTX as a fully integrated liquidity provider. The move connects Morgan Stanley to an electronic corporate bond marketplace that uses AI tools to support trading and liquidity. This development reflects ongoing efforts across fixed income markets to increase electronic trading and improve access to liquidity for institutional clients. Morgan Stanley, trading at $191.88, has delivered a return of 51.9% over the past year and...

headline: How The Story On Advanced Enzyme Technologies (NSEI:ADVENZYMES) Is Evolving Around A ₹370 Fair Value
summary: The fair value estimate for Advanced Enzyme Technologies is held at ₹370, with analysts choosing not to shift their valuation anchor despite refreshed model inputs. That steady price target lines up with commentary that the key question now is execution against the current plan rather than a change in the core story. As you read on, you will see how this stable ₹370 figure fits into the evolving analyst narrative and what it means for your own view on the stock. Stay updated as the Fair Value...
